examples: He was sitting at the other end of the table, tight-lipped and angry.
Military officials are still tight-lipped about when or whether their forces will launch a ground offensive.
A thin-lipped smile spread over the captain's face.
The outgoing boardmembers were tight-lipped when asked their opinions on the outcome of the meeting.
Clicker plans to make money from sponsored search, but Lanzone is tight-lipped about other revenue plans.
